description: Public-safe schema for representing candidate mechanisms as causal graphs before prediction generation.
acceptance_criteria: At least two nodes are present.
At least one edge connects existing nodes.
Every causal/modulatory edge can reach at least one measurement node or observable output node.
At least one observable output is declared with a variable and units.
At least one required measurement is declared.
At least one alternative mechanism is listed.
A falsification route is explicit and non-empty.
No private, personal, household, health, animal-care, financial, location, relationship, credential, or transcript-derived details are included.
